# 🔮 What it will take for AI to scale (energy, compute, talent)

**From:** "Azeem Azhar, Exponential View" <exponentialview@substack.com>
**Date:** 2025-12-11T16:42:23.000Z
**Folder:** exponential

---

View this post on the web at https://www.exponentialview.co/p/what-it-will-take-for-ai-to-scale

Listen on Apple Podcasts [ https://substack.com/redirect/31927da0-2e33-44c5-a49f-078bffa17c7e?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ] or Spotify [ https://substack.com/redirect/3997e1ee-3345-48e2-81ee-1e9f20627d21?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]
I recently set out my macro view on the next 24 months of AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/8d746c7e-8a16-4531-9273-ac9c2537e5e6?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]. The response was strong and many of you wrote in with questions. In this episode, I build on that analysis and answer your questions.
Some highlights:
(03:36 [ https://substack.com/redirect/9fe4afab-9f16-4133-a242-9d3deefa18fe?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]) The biggest AI constraint right now
(10:43 [ https://substack.com/redirect/1b998e02-503b-450b-b36b-65a867b7b6b0?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]) Why mid-2026 is a crucial turning point
(18:41 [ https://substack.com/redirect/5fc4ccf3-fb57-49df-bc87-be11b6dabc2f?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]) The market’s reaction to OpenAI’s code red
(20:51 [ https://substack.com/redirect/cab4a324-4527-4564-b9d1-7871fc765b56?j=eyJ1IjoicXd0ciJ9.0tEpqnOrcfuKYRYnEOurmlOZ_pVIUnS06konjQA-bCs ]) The best strategy for middling powers?
